rules.description:
Units 你軍隊中的 with the 突觸 or Cult Ambush abilities replace those abilities with this one.

In the Deploy Armies step, your opponent must set up their entire army before you set up any of 你的單位. If both players have a rule that allows them to do this, both players set up their units normally.

rules.description:
When selecting this 分遣隊, you must select either the **^^泰倫蟲族^^** or **^^基因竊取者教派^^** keyword.

----------

If you selected **^^泰倫蟲族^^**, you can include up to one of the following unit:
- **^^Broodlord^^**

You can include up to three of the following unit:
- **^^Genestealers^^** (5 or 10 models)

----------

If you selected **^^基因竊取者教派^^**, you can include up to one of the following unit:
- **^^Patriarch^^**

You can include up to three of the following unit:
- **^^Purestrain Genestealers^^** (5 or 10 models)

sharedRules.description: If your Army 陣營 is TYRANIDS, while a TYRANIDS unit 你軍隊中的 is 6 吋內 of one or more friendly SYNAPSE models, that TYRANIDS unit is said to be within 突觸 射程 of 該模型 and of your army. While a TYRANIDS unit 你軍隊中的 is within 突觸 射程 of your army: - 每當 該單位 takes a 戰鬥震懾 test, take that test on 3D6 instead of 2D6. - 每當 a model in 該單位 makes a melee attack, add 1 to the 力量 characteristic of that attack.
sharedRules.name: 突觸

sharedRules.description: If your Army 陣營 is TYRANIDS, once per battle, in either player's 指揮階段, if one or more units 你軍隊中的 with this ability are on the battlefield, you can unleash the Shadow in the Warp. When you do, each 敵方單位 on the battlefield must take a 戰鬥震懾 test. 每當 an 敵方單位 takes such a 戰鬥震懾 test, if it is 6 吋內 of one or more SYNAPSE units 你軍隊中的, subtract 1 from that test.
sharedRules.name: 什阿德奧 in 斯艾 沃阿爾普

sharedRules.description:
Units 你軍隊中的 with the Shadow in the Warp ability retain that ability.

Units 你軍隊中的 with the 突觸 ability retain that ability and gain this one.

When measuring whether a unit 你軍隊中的 is within 突觸 射程 of a friendly **^^突觸^^** model, Walls and closed Hatchways are ignored.
sharedRules.name: 斯伊恩阿普特伊克 沃艾布

sharedRules.description:
Units 你軍隊中的 with the Cult Ambush ability lose that ability and **^^基因竊取者教派^^** units 你軍隊中的 gain this one.


In the Deploy Armies step, your opponent must set up their entire army before you set up any of 你的單位. If both players have a rule that allows them to do this, both players set up their units normally.

rules.description:
在 first battle round, 選擇一個 of the following Hyper-adaptations to be active for **^^泰倫蟲族^^** units 你軍隊中的 until the end of the battle:

**SWARMING INSTINCTS**
每當 a **^^泰倫蟲族^^** model with this Hyper-adaptation 進行一次攻擊 that targets an enemy **^^步兵^^** or **^^Swarm^^** unit, that attack has the **[SUSTAINED HITS 1]** ability.

**HYPER-AGGRESSION**
每當 a **^^泰倫蟲族^^** model with this Hyper-adaptation 進行一次攻擊 that targets an enemy **^^怪獸^^** or **^^載具^^** unit, that attack has the **[LETHAL HITS]** ability.

**HIVE PREDATORS**
每當 a **^^泰倫蟲族^^** model with this Hyper-adaptation 進行一次攻擊 that targets an enemy **^^角色^^** unit, if a 暴擊命中 is scored, that attack has the **[PRECISION]** ability.

rules.description: In your 指揮階段, each HARVESTER unit 你軍隊中的 can Regenerate 一個友方 TYRANIDS unit that is 6 吋內 of it. A unit can only be regenerated once per phase. 每當 a unit regenerates, do one of the following: - One model in 該單位 regains up to D3+1 lost wounds. - One destroyed INFANTRY model (excluding CHARACTERS) is returned to 該單位 with its full 剩餘耐傷. If 該單位 is an ENDLESS MULTITUDE unit, up to 3 destroyed models are returned instead.

rules.description:
在 battle round, 你可以選擇 one of the Synaptic Imperatives shown below. Until the end of the battle round, that Synaptic Imperative is active for your army and while a **^^泰倫蟲族^^** unit 你軍隊中的 is within 突觸 射程 of your army, it will benefit from it. Each Synaptic Imperative can only be selected once per battle.

- **Synaptic Augmentation:** While 此單位 is within 突觸 射程 of your army, 此單位中的模型 have a 5+ invulnerable save.
- **Surging Vitality:** While 此單位 is within 突觸 射程 of your army, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for 此單位.
- **Goaded to Slaughter:** While 此單位 is within 突觸 射程 of your army, 每當 a model in 此單位 makes a melee attack, add 1 to the 命中擲骰

每當 a **^^Burrower^^** unit 你軍隊中的 is set up on the battlefield from Reserves, place a circular 40mm Tunnel Marker anywhere on the battlefield within 1" of 該單位 and more than 3" horizontally away from all 敵方單位.

In the Reinforcements step of your 移動階段, when you set up a unit on the battlefield from Reserves, you can set 該單位 up 完全位於 9" of one of your Tunnel Markers and more than 6" horizontally away from any 敵方單位.

If an 敵方模型 (excluding **^^航空器^^**) ends any kind of move 3 吋內 of one of your Tunnel Markers, that Tunnel Marker is removed from the battlefield.

Genestealers on the hunt combine malevolent cunning and inhuman agility to strike and fade again and again, until their prey are reduced to panicked disarray.

rules.description:
More and yet more Neophytes surge from tunnel mouths, mine entrances and derelict fortifications, drowning the foe in a tide of fanatical killers.

In your 指揮階段, if a friendly NEOPHYTE HYBRIDS unit is within a terrain area, 該單位 heals 3 wounds.

This detachment has the HOSTS tag and cannot be taken with another HOSTS detachment.

rules.name: 普辛伊克 普阿爾阿斯伊特伊斯姆
rules.description:
With each tug on the synaptic leash, the Hive Mind drains more of its hapless worshippers.

在你的 移動階段, for each 泰倫蟲族 突觸 unit 你軍隊中的, 你可以選擇 一個友方 基因竊取者教派 unit (excluding Purestrain Genestealer and Patriarch units) and 一個友方 泰倫蟲族 unit each 9 吋內 of and visible to that 突觸 unit. 若如此做, that 基因竊取者教派 unit 你軍隊中的 suffers D3+1 點致命傷s and one model in the selected 泰倫蟲族 unit regains up to that many lost wounds and until the start of your next 移動階段, 每當 a model in the selected 泰倫蟲族 unit 進行一次攻擊, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.

泰倫蟲族 units 你軍隊中的 have the following ability:

Catalyst (Aura): While an 敵方單位 is 6 吋內 of 此單位, 每當 a friendly 基因竊取者教派 unit 進行一次攻擊 that targets that 敵方單位, add 1 to the 命中擲骰.

The Star Children's Blessings: You can include 泰倫蟲族 Vanguard Invader units (excluding 航空器, Broodlord and Genestealers units) in your army. The combined points cost of such units depends on your battle size:
- 入侵戰: Up to 500 分
- 打擊部隊: Up to 1000 分
- 猛攻戰: Up to 1500 分

No 泰倫蟲族 models 你軍隊中的 can be your 戰帥.

characteristics.name: 說明
characteristics.$text:
Spontaneous biomorphs amongst this brood of Purestrains render them bigger, stronger, and mark them out as surely being the chosen of the Star Children themselves.

PURESTRAIN GENESTEALERS unit only. This unit has:
- +1 T.
- 4+ Sv.
- This unit's melee attacks have +1 S.

characteristics.name: 說明
characteristics.$text:
By the time the prey realise that they are being hunted, the Hive Mind's vanguard organisms have already enfolded them in a murderous embrace. There is no hiding from what comes next.

NEUROLICTOR/LICTOR/VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit only. In 對手的 移動階段, when an 敵方單位 ends a move 8 吋內 of 此單位, 此單位 can make a normal move of up to D3+3".

characteristics.name: 說明
characteristics.$text:
The dermis of these biohunters has been adapted to subtly alter hue according to what the ocular receptors of the prey expect to see, thus hiding the creatures even in plain sight.

VON RYAN'S LEAPERS unit only. This unit has -3" detection range.
